result: The cleaned dataset has been successfully created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 rows and 7 columns (NSID, incwhh14, incwhh15, incwhhcnt14, incwhhcnt15, incwhh16, incwhh17). All missing codes have been harmonized to the standard scheme (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -3=Not asked, -2=Script error, -1=Item not applicable). Banded income variables (incwhh14, incwhh15) were derived from continuous income for ages 14-15, while banded variables (incwhh16, incwhh17) were retained from the original categorical data for ages 16-17.
